# render-diff

Diff renderer for the db-schema facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's schema to one SQL table name per
`pgTable` (via `dbSchemaToComparable` in the facet `core/`) so the host can
diff a plugin's tables between the worktree and main. Entity-extension
relationships are derived cross-refs and stay out of the diff, mirroring the
legacy `tableStrings()`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the db-schema facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChanges.DiffRenderer` "Tables"
